hero.title: Your Organization. Your Digital Workforce. One Intelligence.
hero.subtitle: IDA is the operating system that lets every team work with the same living memory of the company.

whatIsIda.title: What Is IDA?
whatIsIda.description: IDA is not another AI chat. It is the shared intelligence layer that connects people, data, and digital workers across your entire organization.

forTheWholeOrganization.title: Built for the Whole Organization
forTheWholeOrganization.description: From the CEO to the project team, from finance to sales — everyone works from the same up-to-date memory.

leadership.title: Leadership
leadership.description: See organization health, risks, and opportunities in one view.

financeOperations.title: Finance & Operations
financeOperations.description: Track commitments, cash flow, and execution in real time.

salesCustomer.title: Sales & Customer Teams
salesCustomer.description: Understand every account, relationship, and upcoming renewal.

memory.title: One Organization Memory
memory.description: Every email, document, meeting, and decision is connected in one place.

perspectives.title: Multiple Human Perspectives
perspectives.description: CEO, CFO, Sales, Project Manager, and HR each see the information they need.

workforce.title: Digital Workforce
workforce.description: AI workers handle analysis, drafting, and monitoring — so humans can focus on decisions.

whyDifferent.title: Why IDA Is Different
whyDifferent.description: Most AI tools help individuals. IDA helps the entire organization think and act together.

ctaSection.note: No credit card required • Ready in under 2 minutes
